title: anathallis fractiflexa
intro: Anathallis fractiflexa is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is also known as the 'flexible anathallis' due to its unique flexible leaves, and is used for its medicinal properties. Anathallis fractiflexa has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing its health benefits to be utilized in various forms.
